Hilltop Cottages · Montauk

Where Montauk still feels like Montauk.

Nine family-run cottages on a quiet hilltop, a five-minute walk to private Hither Hill Beach. Pet-friendly. Open year-round.

Reserve Your Stay View Cottages

A note from the innkeepers

A small place with long memories.

We're a family-run cottage retreat tucked onto a Montauk hilltop, where the lawns slope down toward gardens, a gazebo, and the sound of the surf in the distance. Nine cottages. Trees old enough to remember the seventies. A short walk to a private stretch of Hither Hill Beach.

Some of our guests have been coming for thirty years. Their kids now bring their own kids. The dogs come too. The doors stay open year-round, because Montauk in October is its own quiet kind of magic.

— Wen

  • 9
    Cottages
  • 5 min
    Walk to Beach
  • 365
    Days a Year
  • 50+
    Years Family-Run

Stay with us

Nine cottages, each its own.

From a one-room efficiency to a three-bedroom guesthouse, every cottage has its own character — kitchens, living rooms, decks, and a place outside to put your feet up.

Two bedrooms

The Hither

Our flagship two-bedroom cottage. Full kitchen, sun-warmed living room, and a deck that catches the afternoon light.

Sleeps 4 · Pet-friendly

Two cottages

North & South

A pair of twin cottages perfect for families traveling together. Private decks, shared garden views, and a shared sunset over the trees.

Sleeps 4 each · Adjacent

One bedroom

East & West

Bright, vaulted-ceiling cottages with full kitchens and quiet bedrooms. The sort of place you settle into for a long weekend and never quite want to leave.

Sleeps 2-3 · Year-round

Two bedrooms

The Seaview

A wraparound deck, a covered pergola, and an unobstructed view of the lawn rolling toward the trees. Mornings here are quieter.

Sleeps 4 · Largest deck

Studio

One-Room Efficiency

Compact, well-loved, and just right for two. Kitchenette, sleeping nook, private entrance. The shortest walk to the lawn.

Sleeps 2 · Studio layout

Three bedrooms

Guesthouse Suite

Three bedrooms, full kitchen, dining table that fits everyone. Reunions, milestone weekends, the trip you've been promising for years.

Sleeps 6 · Group-friendly

After dinner

The fire pit, most nights.

Once the sun drops behind the trees, the fire pit at the South Cottage usually fills up. Guests bring out their own bottle of wine, the kids find marshmallows, and the dogs work the perimeter for crumbs.

It's the unofficial center of the property — and it's the kind of thing you can't really plan for. It just happens, every night, the way it has for years.

Included with every stay

The small things, handled.

No resort fees. No hidden charges. Just the things you'd want from a Montauk cottage stay.

  • Pet-Friendly

    Dogs welcome in every cottage. The lawn is theirs too.

  • Outdoor Fire Pit

    Lit most nights, weather permitting. Bring marshmallows.

  • Gardens & Gazebo

    Landscaped grounds, lawn, and a quiet gazebo to read in.

  • 5-Min to Beach

    A short walk to private Hither Hill Beach access.

  • Year-Round

    Open every season. Off-season Montauk is its own thing.

  • Free WiFi

    Strong signal across all cottages and the lawn.

  • Free Parking

    On-site parking for every cottage. No hunting for spots.

  • Picnic & Grills

    Tables and grills around the property — cook outside.

"We've been coming for years. The grounds are immaculate, the cottages are clean and cozy, and you can't beat the walk down to the beach."
— Returning Guest, Tripadvisor

A closer look

Around the property.

Find us

Lincoln Road, Montauk.

Set on a quiet hilltop just off East Lake Drive, we're a five-minute walk from private Hither Hill Beach access — and a ten-minute drive from Montauk's harbor, restaurants, and the lighthouse.
